name: prompts.mdx
description: Portable Agent Skills & Prompts for ANY Coding Agent (2026+). Follows the open Agent Skills standard (SKILL.md).
author: rishistyping

skills.name: here-now
skills.description: Instant web publishing for any HTML/static artifact. One-command 'publish to here.now' → live URL.

skills.name: strict-typescript
skills.description: Strict TypeScript + ESLint + Prettier enforcement. Zero any, full type safety, modern best practices.

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Comprehensive security audits and secure coding (OWASP, auth, injection, secrets, headers).

skills.name: react-nextjs
skills.description: Modern React 19 + Next.js 15+ best practices (Server Components, App Router, performance, a11y, SEO).

skills.name: monorepo-best-practices
skills.description: Turborepo / Nx / pnpm workspaces patterns, caching, versioning, CI optimization, and scaling.

skills.name: custom-example
skills.description: Template for creating new universal skills. Copy and customize.

install.manual: Copy skills/ folder to ~/.claude/skills/, ~/.cursor/skills/, or project .cursor/skills/
